categories.name: Mild
categories.description: Easy social antics. Low risk, high charm.
challenges: Compliment someone in the friend group unexpectedly but genuinely. Share it in your story with one sentence.
Promote the most boring thing you ate today as if it were a Michelin-starred meal.
Take a 'profile photo' of the most random object near you and post it as if it's you.
Post a sincere movie review for a movie you've never seen.
Make a 'morning routine' video using only chaotic items in your room.

categories.name: Spicy
categories.description: A little drama, a little cringe. Camera on.
challenges: Strike your most dramatic pose with the lowest effort possible and share it.
Voice over your current view as if you're shooting a nature documentary and share it.
Hum your favorite song for 5 seconds without making any facial expressions and share it.
Pretend to give an Oscar acceptance speech for the most mundane thing you did today.
Do a 'get ready with me' but only narrate aggressive criticisms of yourself.

categories.name: Unhinged
categories.description: Chaos mode. Proceed at your own social cost.
challenges: Text 'I know your secret' to a random person in your contacts and share the screenshot (hide the name).
Post a thirst trap of your shoe.
Record yourself passionately defending a deeply unpopular opinion for 15 seconds.
Call a friend, breathe heavily for 4 seconds, then say 'wrong number' and hang up. Share the call log.
Post a fake announcement that you've been accepted into a fictional secret society.
